embedding.apiKey.label: API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for embeddings. Supports OpenAI and Google Gemini (use ${GEMINI_API_KEY} for env var)

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Embedding model: gemini-embedding-2-preview (Google, free, 3072 dims) or text-embedding-3-small (OpenAI)

chatModel.label: Chat Model
chatModel.help: LLM for graph extraction and smart capture. Auto-detected from embedding provider if not set.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

smartCapture.label: Smart Capture (LLM)
smartCapture.help: Use LLM to intelligently extract facts (1 API call per message, more accurate than regex)

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture
